name: Manulife Teda Fund Management Co., Ltd. - Manulife Teda CSI 500 Index Enhanced Fund
summary: Manulife Teda Fund Management Co., Ltd. - Manulife Teda CSI 500 Index Enhanced Fund is an index-enhanced fund that aims to outperform the CSI 500 Index. The fund utilizes quantitative strategies to achieve higher returns than the index. It is managed by Manulife Teda Fund Management Co., Ltd., a joint venture between Manulife and TEDA.
